title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-provider AI coding workflow that chains Claude Opus for planning and integration, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and targets beautiful frontend generation. The author argues Gemini excels at frontend aesthetics while Opus handles planning and other tasks best.
